name: Dentist Simulator 2
summary: Perform many dental procedures in fast, skill-based VR gameplay: cleaning, anesthesia, gum work, extractions, dentures, braces, implants, and more. Customize your setup, face randomized appointments, and improve your technique as you play. Unlock achievements, collect items, and climb global leaderboards while enjoying dynamic, fun, and replayable challenges. 🎮
